description: Fork of Castor6/openviking-plugins — production-grade auto-recall + auto-capture hooks for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenClaw

files.purpose: NPM manifest. Defines name (claude-code-openviking-memory), version 0.1.5, ESM module type, build/test scripts, dependencies (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod)
NPM lockfile for reproducible installs. Pinned dependency versions for @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and zod
TypeScript config. Target ES2022, ESNext modules, strict mode, compiles src/ → servers/
Hook definitions for Claude Code plugin system. Three hooks: SessionStart (bootstrap, 120s), UserPromptSubmit (auto-recall, 8s), Stop (auto-capture, 45s)

Shared configuration loader. Multi-agent aware (OPENVIKING_AGENT_ID env). Reads client config + server ov.conf, supports local/remote mode, env var expansion, validates all fields with clamping/defaults

Auto-recall hook script. Triggered on UserPromptSubmit. Reads user prompt from stdin, performs scoped semantic search + grep hybrid search (RRF merge), ranks results with query-aware scoring (leaf/event/pref/overlap/authority boosts), applies Caveman compaction, injects memories via systemMessage. Tracks recalled URIs for Record Used

Auto-capture hook script. Triggered on Stop. Reads transcript, extracts incremental turns (only new since last capture), runs capture decision (semantic or keyword mode), performs Content Merge (dupe check score >0.85 → append), creates OV session → extract → store. Tracks Record Used URIs and Auto-Links to project
SessionStart hook script. Ensures MCP runtime dependencies are installed. Checks project content in OV and triggers on-demand sync via ov-project-sync.sh if missing
Shared runtime management. Handles paths, source state hashing (SHA-256), install state tracking, file sync, directory-based install locking with stale detection, npm ci execution
MCP server launcher. Ensures runtime is installed, then spawns memory-server.js as child process with signal forwarding (SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGHUP)

Standalone debug script for recall pipeline. Walks through all stages (config, health, search, post-process, ranking, picks, system message) with ANSI-colored verbose output. Usage: node scripts/debug-recall.mjs "query"

Standalone debug script for capture pipeline. Supports file mode (transcript path) and stdin mode. Shows transcript parsing, incremental state, shouldCapture decisions, session pipeline, extracted memories. Usage: node scripts/debug-capture.mjs /path/to/transcript.jsonl
Structured JSON Lines debug logger. Zero-cost no-ops when debug disabled. Logs to ~/.openviking/logs/cc-hooks.log with local ISO timestamps

Compiled MCP server (TypeScript → JS). 6 tools: memory_recall, memory_store, memory_forget, memory_health, memory_search (glob/grep), convert_to_markdown (markitdown). Full OpenVikingClient class with scope resolution, URI normalization, session management

TypeScript source for MCP server. 4 tools (original Castor6 set): memory_recall, memory_store, memory_forget, memory_health. OpenVikingClient class, memory ranking, query-aware scoring. NOTE: compiled servers/memory-server.js has 2 additional tools (memory_search, convert_to_markdown) not present in .ts source
Unit tests for config.mjs using node:test. 5 tests: local mode ov.conf fallback, remote mode, missing ov.conf fallback, env var expansion, remote baseUrl requirement
Project instructions for Claude Code. Documents tech stack, decisions, status, file map
Main documentation (English). Architecture diagrams, setup guide, configuration reference, hook timeouts, troubleshooting
Chinese translation of README.md
Product Requirements Document. Vision, features (must/should/could), target audience
Migration guide from legacy claude-memory-plugin (bash+python) to new plugin (MCP+Node.js). Step-by-step instructions, behavior comparison
Architecture document stub. Marked as pending post-code-review
Chronological progress log. Documents all waves of development from initial fork through hybrid search deployment
Session working memory. Tracks active goal, last state, open questions, next steps

external_dependencies.purpose: CWD → scope mapping (project/system/infra/knowledge/personal). Source-authority score multipliers. Shared across all CLI hooks
Caveman compaction — regex-based text compression for recalled memory injection. ~30% token reduction
Scope configuration. Defines project base paths, infra patterns, personal projects, scope URIs, source authority tiers, compaction settings

risk_legend.high: Core logic — bugs here break recall/capture/MCP for all clients. Changes require testing across all 4 CLIs
risk_legend.medium: Supporting infrastructure — bugs cause degraded behavior (no bootstrap, wrong config) but fail gracefully
risk_legend.low: Documentation, debug tools, tests, config — safe to modify
